original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations
original_registry_entry.version: NICE clinical guideline CG32, last updated 2017
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE nutrition, dietetics, consent, capacity, and referral adaptation
original_registry_entry.population: Adults in hospital and community settings with clinical concern for malnutrition or impaired intake.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: General practice, community, hospital, nutrition, and multidisciplinary assessment.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for documenting unintentional weight loss, poor appetite, altered taste, impaired swallowing, altered bowel habit, reduced intake, BMI and percentage weight loss when measured. It does not calculate risk or generate nutrition support.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.6 — screening, clinical concern, weight loss, intake, and swallowing
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.3.1–1.3.4 — malnutrition and consent context
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-recorded malnutrition or risk criteria and consent or best-interest discussion; no diagnosis, calculation, feeding route, or treatment is generated.

title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations
publisher: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE nutrition, dietetics, consent, capacity, and referral adaptation
population: Adults in hospital and community settings with clinical concern for malnutrition or impaired intake.
intended_setting: General practice, community, hospital, nutrition, and multidisciplinary assessment.
